title: MapUpdate
description: mapping -> server -> viz. Full payload pushed to the phone over the websocket: occupancy grid plus current pose plus planned return path.

resolution_m.description: Edge length of one cell, meters per cell.

origin.description: Map-frame coordinate of cell (0,0), the grid lower-left corner.

cells.description: Row-major, length width*height. -1 unknown, 0 free, 100 occupied.

return_path.description: Planned return route, ordered start of travel to goal. Empty until a return is requested.

targets.description: Detected objects of interest (e.g. from YOLO), in the map frame. Empty until something is found.

start.description: Map-frame position {x, y} of the mission start (home), for the viewer's START marker. null if not set yet.

point_cloud.description: Optional 3D point cloud for the 3D viz only (navigation never uses it). Flat list of map-frame coords [x0,y0,z0, x1,y1,z1, ...]. Empty unless a depth source produces it.

point_cloud_rgb.description: Optional per-point color parallel to point_cloud (flat [r0,g0,b0, ...], 0..255). Same point count as point_cloud/3. Empty unless an RGB source produces it. Viz only.

mesh.description: Optional reconstructed triangle mesh ('3D scan') for the 3D viz only (navigation never uses it). null unless a depth source produces it.

colors.description: Optional flat per-vertex color [r0,g0,b0, ...] (0..255), parallel to vertices.
